name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. CSS-First: downloads original CSS files and uses original class names for pixel-perfect reproduction. Auto-detects site type (Shopify/WordPress/Next.js/Tailwind) and chooses CSS-First or Extract-Values strategy. Pipeline orchestrator (run-pipeline.sh) enforces correct step ordering. Downloads video backgrounds, Typekit/Adobe Fonts, and all JS bundles. Produces transition-spec.json as single source of truth — transitions are implemented simultaneously with components, not separately. Verifies with getComputedStyle numerical diff, not visual judgment. v0.1.1: mandatory section-height/gap extraction, original SVG extraction, preloader JS bundle analysis, font-size accuracy enforcement, Tailwind v4 arbitrary value compatibility check.
